---
title: "test"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
source(here::here("scripts", "load_functions.R"))
trigger <- load_trigger_functions()
```

```{r}
hourly_long <- trigger$read_trigger_tables(
  granularity = "hourly", output = "long",
  cores = 4, verbose = T)
```

```{r}
daily_long <- trigger$read_trigger_tables(
  granularity = "daily", output = "long", min_obs_per_hour = 10,
  cores = 4, verbose = T)
```
